title: syzygium calcadense
intro: Syzygium calcadense, also known as the Nilgiri olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Syzygium calcadense include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include its leaves being used in teas and infusions, as well as its fruits being used in jams and other edible products.
